card.title: mazer: normalize browser UI layout across viewports
card.summary: Normalize responsive browser geometry and preserve only semantic settings so viewport changes cannot replay stale layout.
card.objective: Recompute all menu, Options, play, and Pause geometry from the active content rectangle while preserving explicit player preferences only.
acceptanceCriteria: Layout-derived geometry is never persisted as player preference state.
A recalculated layout cannot overlap, escape the viewport, or hide essential controls.
Normal reload preserves supported semantic settings with safe migration defaults.
Narrow, wide, phone, and restore endpoints have deterministic evidence.
discoveries: The exact deployed preview passes after the share credential is consumed and the application route remains canonical.
Native browser chrome and physical maximize or restore remain separate from the deterministic phone-shape gate.
nextActions: Review the exact PR #76 deployment on mobile Safari and record any browser-chrome or restored-layout drift.
Extend deterministic proof to native maximize or restore without persisting derived geometry.
evidence: Full Mazer verification passed 363 of 363 tests and the production build.
Vercel preview dpl_GRbdcJ4KYMAvesH5VSRegBWsPvXS passed exact deployed 393x852 surface verification.

entry.headline: Exact deployed browser and phone-shape review gate passed
completed: Verified menu, Options, play, Pause, scrolling, text containment, overlap, and button fit on the exact deployed preview.
Added proof support for Vercel share links without weakening route checks.
discovered: Physical mobile Safari review remains required before production promotion.
next: Collect physical browser-chrome and restored-layout evidence.
